items.title: BNP Paribas adds six Bitcoin, Ether ETNs for retail clients in France
items.summary: Crypto ETN adoption is spreading across Europe as banks expand offerings and the UK reopens retail access after lifting its ban.

items.title: Warren probes China-based Bitmain over US security concerns: Report
items.summary: US authorities launched the “Operation Red Sunset” probe into Bitmain last year over potential espionage and grid risks.

items.summary_cn: 美国当局去年启动“红日行动”调查比特大陆，涉及潜在间谍活动和电网风险。

items.title: Potential Bitcoin crash below $60K may delay recovery to 2027: Data
items.summary: Bitcoin’s return to all-time highs may depend on how deep the current drawdown extends, with deeper declines historically lengthening recovery times.

items.summary_cn: 比特币重返历史高点可能取决于当前回撤的深度，历史上更深的跌幅会延长复苏时间。

items.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs break 4-week inflow streak as capital avoids ‘directional risk’
items.summary: Spot Bitcoin ETFs see $296 million in weekly outflows after a month-long inflow streak, as macro uncertainty keeps capital sidelined.
items.title_cn: 现货比特币ETF打破连续4周资金流入，资本回避“方向性风险”
items.summary_cn: 现货比特币ETF在连续一个月资金流入后出现2.96亿美元周度流出，宏观不确定性使资本保持观望。

items.title: Morgan Stanley sets 0.14% Bitcoin ETF fee, lowest in market if approved
items.summary: Bloomberg ETF analyst Eric Balchunas said Morgan Stanley’s 16,000 financial advisors would have no problem recommending the product at such low fees.
items.title_cn: 摩根斯坦利设定0.14%比特币ETF费率，若获批将为市场最低
items.summary_cn: 彭博ETF分析师埃里克·巴尔丘纳斯表示，摩根斯坦利的1.6万名财务顾问在如此低的费率下推荐该产品将毫无困难。

items.title: Bitcoin’s quantum-resistance lag may become Ethereum’s bull case: Nic Carter
items.summary: Crypto entrepreneur Nic Carter claims that Bitcoin developers still have their "head in the sand" when it comes to making Bitcoin quantum-resistant, compared to Ethereum.

items.summary_cn: 加密货币企业家尼克·卡特声称，与以太坊相比，比特币开发者在使比特币具备抗量子能力方面仍“把头埋在沙子里”。

items.title: Ethereum builders propose ‘economic zone’ to tackle L2 fragmentation
items.summary: Developers from Gnosis and Zisk propose a framework to connect fragmented rollups, amid growing debate over Ethereum’s scaling model and interoperability challenges.
items.title_cn: 以太坊建设者提出“经济区”以解决L2碎片化问题

items.title: Ethereum 'flippening' odds rise, but it won't involve Bitcoin
items.summary: Polymarket traders now see a real risk of ETH losing its number-two crypto ranking in 2026, with odds jumping from 17% to over 59% this year.
items.title_cn: 以太坊“超越”几率上升，但不会涉及比特币
items.summary_cn: Polymarket交易者现在认为ETH在2026年失去第二大加密货币排名的真实风险增加，几率从今年的17%跃升至超过59%。

items.title: Ether traders see ‘further decline’ as ETH price slips below $2K

items.title: Ether needs these 3 indicators to flip to trigger rally above $2.4K

items.title: Wall Street Fear Gauge Hits 31 on Hormuz Supply Fears and Oil Price Shock

ai_summary.en:
**🌍 Global Macro & Liquidity**: Macro environment shows extreme risk-off conditions with VIX at 31.05 (Extreme Panic Rising +18.74%), DXY strengthening (100.32, +0.89%), and US10Y yields elevated at 4.44% (+2.45%). Fed expectations remain restrictive (3.643% implied rate), while Yen weakness suggests some risk-on appetite but intervention risk looms. News narratives focus on geopolitical tensions (Iran conflict odds at 71%), oil shocks, and crypto infrastructure contraction (ATM count falling). BTC Fear & Greed at 8 (Extreme Fear) confirms bearish sentiment.

**🟠 BTC Strategy (Contract Only)**:
* **Signal**: PROBE
* **Reality Check**: Price rank 20.3/100 indicates oversold conditions with RSI at 34.3. Negative funding (-0.000028) suggests short bias, but long liquidation ($9.1M) exceeds short ($3.0M), indicating retail pain. Lower wick exhaustion at 30.3% shows some bottom absorption. ADX at 34.2 confirms strong downtrend - don't fade aggressively.

**🔷 ETH Strategy**:
* **Signal**: OBSERVE
* **Reality Check**: Whale sentiment neutral (-0.0) but token net flow negative (-1.08M ETH), suggesting accumulation despite bearish macro. However, stablecoin outflow (-$336K) and L/S account ratio of 1.51 show more long accounts but smaller positions. News mentions Ethereum 'flippening' odds but quantum-resistance concerns. RSI at 35.3 oversold, ADX 33.9 shows strong trend.
* **Key Metric**: Negative token net flow (-1.08M ETH) indicates whale accumulation despite bearish sentiment - contrarian signal.

**🟣 SOL Strategy**:
* **Signal**: PROBE
* **Reality Check**: Whale sentiment slightly negative (-0.2) with token net flow negative (-667K SOL) and stablecoin outflow (-$297K). News identical to crypto general - no SOL-specific catalysts. Technicals show oversold (RSI 32.7, price rank 30.1/100) with ADX at 46.5 indicating very strong trend. Lower wick exhaustion at 48.8% shows significant bottom absorption.
* **Key Metric**: ADX at 46.5 confirms extremely strong downtrend - wait for trend exhaustion before major entries.
ai_summary.zh:
**🌍 全球宏观与流动性**: 宏观环境显示极端避险情绪，VIX 指数 31.05（极度恐慌上涨 +18.74%），美元指数走强（100.32，+0.89%），美国10年期国债收益率处于高位 4.44%（+2.45%）。美联储预期保持限制性（隐含利率 3.643%），而日元疲软暗示一定风险偏好，但干预风险隐现。新闻叙事聚焦地缘政治紧张（伊朗冲突概率 71%）、石油冲击和加密基础设施收缩（ATM 数量下降）。BTC 恐惧贪婪指数 8（极度恐惧）确认看跌情绪。

**🟠 BTC 策略（仅限合约）**:
* **信号**: 试探性建仓
* **现实核查**: 价格排名 20.3/100 显示超卖状态，RSI 为 34.3。负资金费率（-0.000028）暗示空头偏向，但多头清算（910 万美元）超过空头（300 万美元），表明散户痛苦。下影线耗尽率 30.3% 显示底部有一定吸收。ADX 34.2 确认强劲下跌趋势 - 不要激进逆势。

**🔷 ETH 策略**:
* **信号**: 持续观察
* **现实核查**: 鲸鱼情绪中性（-0.0），但代币净流出为负（-108 万 ETH），尽管宏观看跌仍暗示积累。然而，稳定币流出（-33.6 万美元）和多空账户比率 1.51 显示更多多头账户但仓位较小。新闻提及以太坊“翻转”概率但量子抗性担忧。RSI 35.3 超卖，ADX 33.9 显示强劲趋势。
* **关键指标**: 负代币净流出（-108 万 ETH）表明鲸鱼在熊市情绪中积累 - 逆向信号。

**🟣 SOL 策略**:
* **信号**: 试探性建仓
* **现实核查**: 鲸鱼情绪略负面（-0.2），代币净流出为负（-66.7 万 SOL），稳定币流出（-29.7 万美元）。新闻与加密市场总体相同 - 无 SOL 特定催化剂。技术指标显示超卖（RSI 32.7，价格排名 30.1/100），ADX 46.5 表明趋势极强。下影线耗尽率 48.8% 显示显著底部吸收。
* **关键指标**: ADX 46.5 确认下跌趋势极强 - 等待趋势耗尽后再大举入场。
